# Dot parity dashboard

Differential survey of graphviz-ts vs the native `dot` oracle over the dot
test corpus. A report, not a gate (AD-1). Regenerate: `npx tsx
test/corpus/survey.ts && npx tsx test/corpus/dashboard.ts`.

## Summary

- **Oracle:** dot 15.1.0 · **corpus root:** `/Users/scottseely/git/graphviz/tests`
- **Surveyed (applicable):** 796
- **byte-match:** 166 · **structural-match:** 252 → 418/796 structurally equal (52.5%)
- **diverged:** 337 · **errored:** 20 · **timeout:** 6 · **oracle-error:** 15
- **Quarantined (not surveyed, from corpus-manifest.json):** engine-deferred 6, multi-graph 3

## structural-match (252)

or extra elements). These are near-misses — sub-pixel-to-modest position drift.

## Divergence backlog (next missions)

Named buckets, largest first. Each is a candidate oracle-pinned fix mission.

### diverged — by firstDiffPath shape

| bucket | count | examples | hypothesis |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `path-structure` | 136 | `1213-1`, `1213-2`, `1447` | edge path has a different command sequence or point count — spline routing structure |
| `element-count` | 129 | `1323`, `1323_1`, `1435` | missing/extra SVG elements — node, edge, cluster box, or arrowhead count differs |
| `attr-or-tag` | 35 | `1447_1`, `1453`, `1622_0` | element tag or a non-coordinate attribute differs |
| `color-stroke` | 26 | `1408`, `1896`, `2082` | fill/stroke value differs — color resolution or default styling |
| `text-content` | 9 | `1990`, `241_1`, `graphs-Latin1` | rendered text string differs — label content, escaping, or character encoding |
| `compare-threw` | 1 | `1472` | compareSvg threw on the port SVG — malformed or partial output |
| `polygon-points` | 1 | `2490` | polygon vertex count differs — node-shape or arrowhead geometry |

### errored — by thrown message

| bucket | count | examples | hypothesis |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `parser-gap` | 10 | `1308_1`, `1367`, `1474` | peggy parser rejects DOT the native parser accepts — parser-gap backlog |
| `undefined-info` | 4 | `121`, `1767`, `2239` | null/undefined access on .info during layout — unported field or invariant gap |
| `undefined-head` | 2 | `1332`, `graphs-b53` | null/undefined access on .head during layout — unported field or invariant gap |
| `maximum-call-stack-size-exceeded` | 2 | `2108`, `2475_2` | port threw — see message; group for a focused fix |
| `undirected-edge-operator-is` | 2 | `graphs-big`, `graphs-biglabel` | port threw — see message; group for a focused fix |
